items.title: Earnings live: UnitedHealth stock falls 19%, American Airlines slides, Texas Instruments pops, Logitech edges higher
items.description: The fourth quarter earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with Big Tech results from Microsoft, Meta, Tesla, and Apple headlining the earnings calendar.

items.title: Capital One Travel Adds Discover Cardholders in Push to Rival Chase and Amex
items.description: Capital One Travel isn't seen as a luxury player like Amex and Chase, but adding Discover's cardholders significantly boosts its competitive position.

items.title: Is Mastercard Stock a Smart Bet Ahead of Q4 Earnings? Key Estimates
items.description: MA heads into Q4 earnings with projected double-digit revenue and EPS growth, strong volumes and cross-border gains, but valuation remains stretched.
